title: 2025 State of the Industry Report - Renewable Fuels Association
content: Geoff Cooperâ€™s State of the Industry address at the National Ethanol Conference (NEC) reflected on the roots of the ethanol industry and laid out a vision for its future under the new Trump administration. Farm income has declined 24% since 2022, with lower corn prices and higher production costs, surpluses are pushing commodity prices down, making it harder for farmers to remain profitable and regulatory barriers continue to limit ethanolâ€™s full potential, particularly restrictions on E15 fuel sales.
author: Analysts Account
